title: crotalaria doniana
intro: Crotalaria doniana, also known as Don's rattlebox, is a plant species in the legume family that is native to tropical Africa. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal activities. The health benefits of Crotalaria doniana include the treatment of fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, as well as its use as a diuretic to alleviate urinary problems. Herbal preparations of the plant include infusions, decoctions, and poultices, which can be made by boiling the leaves, stems, or roots in water to extract its medicinal properties.
